Marietta Square Steakhouse
At the corner of Church Street and North Park Square
Mac’s Chophouse is where great food meets rich history on Marietta Square. Our steakhouse is housed in a beautifully restored, two-story building that dates back to the Civil War era that is full of charm, character, and the kind of details you only get with age. For generations, this spot has been part of the fabric of the historic district, remembered fondly by many locals as the longtime home of Schilling’s.
When we took over, we knew we had something special. So, we kept the original hardwood floors, exposed brick, and all the little details that tell the story of this space. The goal wasn’t to change it, just to bring it back to life with a fresh energy and a menu that honors both tradition and taste.
Whether you're grabbing lunch on the Square or hosting a private event upstairs, Mac’s offers a laid-back, comfortable setting where the past and present come together one great meal at a time.

Marietta Square Restaurant
The Marietta Steakhouse on the Square
In the heart of Marietta Square, Mac's Chophouse is a modern revival of the classic American steakhouse.  Our menu highlights a thoughtful approach to locally-sourced ingredients and hearty, flavor-rich cuisine.  We distinctly pair choice cuts of USDA Prime steak, sustainable seafood and decadent desserts with a highly curated bar program of craft cocktails, premium reserve wines and an extensive bourbon selection.  All is further complemented by the atmosphere - reminiscent of a Prohibition-era speakeasy and enveloped in the picturesque landscape of historic downtown.  We invite you to stop by our unique Marietta restaurant.
Private Event Space in Marietta
The Perfect Venue for Any Occasion
Looking for a one-of-a-kind spot to host your next special event? Mac’s Chophouse offers a
private dining space
that blends historic charm with modern comfort that is perfect for celebrations, corporate dinners or Christmas parties, rehearsal parties, reunions and more.  With personalized menus, exceptional service, and views overlooking the Marietta Square, we make it easy to host events that feel both elegant and effortless.
Whether you’re planning a milestone celebration or a corporate event for a larger group, our experienced team is dedicated to managing every detail ensuring your event runs smoothly and leaves a lasting impression on all your guests.
RESERVE PARTY ROOM
Upcoming Events on the Square
Happenings
There’s always something special happening at Mac’s Chophouse. From festive holiday dinners to exclusive tasting menus and seasonal celebrations, our events on Marietta Square bring extra flavor to every visit.
Whether you're planning a memorable
date night
, a fun evening with
family and friends
, or just looking for a new reason to enjoy the Square, our events offer something for everyone.
Be sure to check back periodically for the latest updates, from can’t-miss events to limited-time menus. Come join us and make your next night out unforgettable.

FAQ's Marietta Square Restaurants
What is the best steakhouse on Marietta Square?
While many steakhouse chains are great, the best options are often locally owned restaurants like Mac’s Chophouse, a favorite Marietta steakhouse. Here you’ll find an elevated steakhouse experience in an intimate setting. For dinner in Marietta, check our farm fresh  menu.
Where is Mac's Chophouse?
Located at the corner of N. Park Square and Church Street, you’ll find a painted brick building that offers private event spaces and window views of Glover Park.
What steakhouse restaurant near me is open in Marietta?
If you’re looking for a restaurant near you, Mac’s Chophouse is open 11 a.m. to 10 p.m. Sunday through Thursday and 11 a.m to midnight Friday and Saturday. The steakhouse offers lunch, brunch, dinner and cocktails on the square.
Where to find restaurants with outdoor seating downtown?
Searching for lunch or dinner outdoors on the Marietta square? Visit Mac’s Chophouse where you can have an exquisite brunch, lunch or dinner in the fresh air. Our outdoor seating is the perfect place to soak up the nice weather with family or friends.
Is there a dresscode?
Dress Code for the Lookout

GENTLEMEN

Collared shirts, long pants or dress shorts are acceptable.
No sweatpants or gym attire. No open toe shoes.  No hats of any kind.
We are proud to announce that Mac's Chophouse was selected by Click360 Awards as the
Best Steak Restaurant of 2025!
Located on the Historic Marietta Square
Overlooking the bustling Grover Park on the corner of N. Park Square, Mac’s Chophouse occupies a historic two-story brick building that dates back to the Civil War era. With beautifully crafted interiors and an elegantly casual atmosphere, it’s the perfect setting for a special meal.
Conveniently located just outside Atlanta, with easy access to I-75 and Truist Park.
19 N. Park Square

--- Page: /brunch-menu ---
Sunday Brunch  Marietta | Brunch Menu | Mac's Chophouse
Brunch Menu
Weekend Brunch Menu
Weekend Brunch Menu
Brunch on Marietta Square
Mac’s Chophouse: it’s where to go for
brunch in Marietta
! Our seasonal brunch menu is the perfect excuse to roll out of bed on the weekend. Not quite breakfast, not quite lunch, it’s the very best part of Saturday & Sunday! With something for every palate, treat yourself to sweet and savory selections and elevated classic flavors with dishes like our Carolina black grouper or the creme brulee French toast with seasonal berries and candied pecans. From our famous French toast to creamy eggs benedict and hearty steak plates, Mac’s has the best brunch in Marietta.
Don’t miss our Weekend Brunch every Saturday & Sunday from 11:00am. We’ve assembled the very best classics for brunch that the Marietta Square has to offer, and we’re serving it up tableside with an impressive selection of brunch cocktails & mimosas! Fruity, sweet, and delightfully bubbly, our brunch cocktails are the perfect treat to pair with your favorite dishes.
Outdoor Brunch Dining
There’s no better place for brunch on the square than Mac’s. Conveniently located at the corner of N. Park Street and Church Street, the recently renovated historical building provides the perfect backdrop for an indulgent mid-morning meal. Request a seat streetside for some people watching in the park or make reservations for socially distant dining upstairs in The Lookout and enjoy dramatic, sweeping views from extra-large windows.
Take a look at our Marietta Brunch menu and have a tasty meal while enjoying the sun on your skin and the breeze in your hair. Order one of our brunch cocktails that change seasonally! As one of the most delicious
Marietta Square restaurants
, whatever you order will be fresh, filling, and leave you feeling satisfied. Contact us for reservations and enjoy this Sunday!
Dress Code
LADIES:
Business Casual, comfortable, but polished dress slacks or no shorter than mid-high dress.
No shorts, sweatpants or gym attire. No low-cut revealing tops.  No baseball hats.
MEN:
Business Casual, comfortable, but polished collared shirts, long pants or dress shorts.
No sweatpants or gym attire.  No open toed shoes.  No baseball hats.

--- Page: /dinner-menu ---
Dinner on the Square | Menu | Mac's Chophouse Marietta
Dinner Menu
Dinner Menu
Download Mac's DInner Menu
Dinner on the Square
Dinner in Marietta
Great steak needs no special occasion. Make plans for dinner on the square at Mac’s, where we’re serving up two great experiences at one great location. Upstairs, book reservations in The Lookout for white-cloth fine dining and park-side views you won’t find anywhere else in town.  Downstairs, stop by for casual dining with first-come, first-seated small plates in The Hangout, or cozy up to the oversized bar and sip on world-class cocktails into the late night. Now with indoor and outdoor seating available, it’s the perfect spot for dinner in Marietta, every night of the week.
Mac's Chophouse partners with local farmers, raw food purveyors, and artisanal chefs to source high-quality ingredients for our seasonal dinner menu. Enjoy extra large Brunswick shrimp pulled straight from the ocean off the South Georgia coast, organic heirloom grains from Anson Mills in Columbia, SC, and prepared meats from Heywood’s Meats right here in Marietta. Our steaks are sourced exclusively from the upper Midwest corn belt. They’re USDA certified Angus prime cuts, butchered in house, and seared at 1700℉ with an infrared broiler for the perfect crust, every time.
Set in a historic building on the corner of N. Park Street on the Historic Square, Mac’s Chophouse offers elevated steakhouse dining with a touch of speakeasy cool. With high ceilings, vintage wooden floors, and gilded accents, every meal is an experience, and a treat for all the senses.
Make reservations today for dinner on the square, and enjoy elevated steakhouse dishes featuring certified-prime steaks, sustainable seafood, and field-fresh produce in an unforgettable setting.
Dress Code
LADIES:
Business Casual, comfortable, but polished dress slacks or no shorter than mid-high dress (no shorts, sweatpants or gym attire) No low-cut revealing tops.  No baseball hats.
MEN:
Business Casual, comfortable, but polished collared shirts, long pants or dress shorts (no sweatpants or gym attire)
No flip flops.  No baseball hats.

Desserts Marietta Square | Dessert Menu | Mac's
Dessert Menu
Dessert Menu
Download Mac's Dessert Menu
Desserts on the square
More than great steaks, Mac’s Chophouse offers decadent dessert in Marietta every day throughout the week. After a great meal, or just as a special treat, our selection of made-from-scratch bakery items is not to be missed.
Updated regularly to highlight the best ingredients the season has to offer, you’ll find creamy custards, delicate bread puddings, buttery cakes, fresh fruits, salted caramel bites, dark chocolate drizzles, and more on our seasonal dessert menu. Don’t miss our signature homemade banana cream pie, available throughout the year, with a toasted almond-vanilla wafer crust, thick banana custard, and whipped meringue.
Treat yourself to dessert on the square from Mac’s Chophouse and indulge in sinfully sweet selections prepared fresh in-house. Linger over the last bite inside after dinner, or request a streetside table and savor every spoonful while watching the world roll by. Whether it’s date night or late night, or just because, we’re saving you a seat.
Ask our bartenders which dessert wines pair well with our seasonal selections, or choose from our sprawling bar program to make the perfect night complete. Short on time? Get it to go! Ask your server to package dessert to go, or call ahead for carryout and enjoy a delicious treat at home.
For dessert in Marietta, Mac’s Chophouse has an unbeatable selection of homemade pastries, custards, and bakery treats. With seasonal ingredients and elevated flavors, you won’t find a better place for dessert on the square. Don’t forget to save room after your next meal, and enjoy the best our pastry chefs have to offer!
